description_long: This is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a white, rounded ceramic pot filled with soil. The plant itself has long, slender green stems with pointed, arrow-shaped leaves, some of which are upright while others arch outward. Several trailing vines with smaller, lighter green leaves cascade over the edge of the pot, adding a sense of lushness and movement. The soil surface is visible and appears to be a dark brown, granular texture. The pot is plain and unadorned, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. This type of plant is commonly used for decorative purposes in both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A white, rounded ceramic pot holds a lush green plant with upright stems and trailing vines. The pot is plain and smooth, and the plant features arrow-shaped leaves and cascading foliage.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from above, showing the full spread of upright stems and trailing vines draping over the pot's edge.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the dense cluster of trailing vines on the left, with upright stems and leaves visible in the center.
description_view_2: The back view shows the pot's smooth, rounded surface and the outward arch of the plant's stems and leaves.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the trailing vines cascading down the right side of the pot and the upright stems in the center.
attribute_plant_species: Arrowhead vine (Syngonium podophyllum) with trailing pothos-like foliage
